name: THE NORMAL THING
short_description: THE NORMAL THING is a story about a dog who lost his memory. Sunless forests, strange gardens, weird inhabitants... Start a little journey to retrieve your memory.
detailed_description:
* You can play this game best in 1920*1080 resolution.

A dog wakes up in the middle of the woods.
He has no memory left about where he is or why he is there



“I opened my eyes with a dim nostalgia.
I woke up but still hazy.
I see nothing because of the dense trees and darkness
No light. Can’t tell whether it’s night or day.
This forest seems strangely unrealistic because of this thick fog.
I was standing here alone without a single sound.”

The Normal Thing is a mystery puzzle escape game.
Explore the mysterious woods by solving various types of puzzles.
